PAGE_TITLE: Add Live Chat to a Website | FastComments
META_DESCRIPTION: Try the FastComments Live Chat demo. Add real-time streaming chat to your website with instant synchronization, SSO support, and full customization.
HERO_DESCRIPTION: Add streaming, live chat to your site, fast. Try out the live chat window below.
INTRO_TEXT: Below is a fully live chat window running on real FastComments infrastructure. Open this page in another tab or on another device and watch your messages sync instantly.
OUTRO_TEXT: Live Chat is completely customizable. In the above demo, we have Anonymous Commenting enabled, but we can require that a user actually logs in, or even use SSO. Custom styling can be applied, as well as all settings that the Live Commenting widget supports. Streaming Chat is included in all plans.
TRY_IT_NOW_TITLE: Try it Now Without an Account
TRY_IT_NOW_DESCRIPTION: Add real-time live chat to your site. Copy one snippet to get started, no account required.
TRY_IT_NOW_SUBHEADING: Get Live Chat Code For Your Site
